arts.ttl: Bologna Eye Milan’s Calabria as Potential Defensive Reinforcement
arts.sum: Bologna FC is actively exploring options to strengthen their defensive lineup, with AC Milan's right-back Davide Calabria emerging as a potential target. The Rossoblu have made initial inquiries about the Italian defender, signalling their interest in bolstering their squad. The post Bologna Eye Milan’s Calabria as Potential Defensive Reinforcement appeared first on FootItalia.com.
